theme.name: Organic Tech (E1 Modified)
theme.description: A grounding blend of earthy sage and bone white, contrasted with a sharp, high-tech neon lime to represent the fusion of biology and technology. Uses solid surfaces over glassmorphism for maximum data clarity.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: The 'Control Room' grid mixed with generous organic padding. High density for the control panel, tactile bento layouts for the simple UI.
spacing_and_layout.containers: rounded-3xl border border-[#132A1B]/10 p-6 sm:p-8 bg-white shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]

components.add_plant_dropdown: Shadcn Select/Dropdown customized with rounded-full trigger, large touch targets, and icons.
components.timer_tracker: Circular radial progress bar displaying lifecycle. Use brand.primary for progress, background in surface_secondary.
components.water_nutrient_indicators: Vertical fill bars (pill-shaped) mimicking physical tubes. No generic text percentages; use physical visual volume.
components.ai_video_chat: Dedicated 'floating' bento widget using the brand.accent_unnatural (Lime) subtle glow to signify AI presence. Inline video player.
components.notifications: Sonner toast with customized left-border colors (Orange for harvest, Blue for water, Red for error).
components.community_feed: Vertical marquee or scrolling list. Minimalist bento cards containing plant images and harvest time.

motion_and_interactions.entrance: staggered fade-up using framer-motion (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1)

icons_and_assets.instructions: Use Duotone weight to mix the sharp tech lines with organic opacity layers.

image_urls.description: Modern vertical hydroponic system. Use subtly behind the detailed control panel or as a landing image.
Close up of seedling. Use as placeholder for new plant additions in the dashboard.
Green garden plant for community feed or mature harvest state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: framer-motion, @phosphor-icons/react, recharts, sonner, lucide-react (if shadcn requires).
Use Shadcn components for Select, Toast, and Tabs (to switch between Simple UI and Control Panel).
Do NOT use glassmorphism. Stick to solid white panels with subtle borders for data clarity.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the detailed panel: tight gaps, full-height stretching children.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Visual indicators over text: Use radial dials for time, and vertical tube shapes for water/nutrient levels.
